title: athyrium scandicinum subsp. newtonii
intro: Athyrium scandicinum subsp. newtonii, also known as Newton's lady fern, is a subspecies of fern in the family Woodsiaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique growth habits. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Newton's lady fern include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb for various health conditions. Newton's lady fern can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
